Name: Average time for Queued + Awaiting Assignment across all process variants containing Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call occurs

Name: Total time spent in Queued + Awaiting Assignment when followed by Completed + In Call versus when followed by Completed + Resolved
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call occurs

Name: Minimum time for Queued + Awaiting Assignment in variants that include Completed + In Call
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity Queued + Awaiting Assignment and the end of the case

Name: Time from Queued + Awaiting Assignment to Completed + In Call in variants where both activities occur
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Average time between Queued + Awaiting Assignment and the next occurrence of Accepted + In Progress in cases that later execute Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Accepted + In Progress'

Name: Total duration of Queued + Awaiting Assignment grouped by country in traces that contain Completed + In Call
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call occurs

Name: Elapsed time between Queued + Awaiting Assignment and Completed + In Call compared to elapsed time between Queued + Awaiting Assignment and Completed + Closed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Time of Queued + Awaiting Assignment in variants starting with Queued + Awaiting Assignment and ending with Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call occurs

Name: Average time it takes Queued + Awaiting Assignment to be completed after the prior Accepted + In Progress in traces involving Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + In Progress' and activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment'

Name: Cycle Time of Queued + Awaiting Assignment in process instances that include Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call occurs

Name: Total time from the start of the case to Queued + Awaiting Assignment in variants that eventually reach Completed + In Call
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call occurs

Name: Minimum time between Queued + Awaiting Assignment and Completed + In Call across all occurrences in the log
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Time from Queued + Awaiting Assignment to the subsequent Accepted + In Progress when the trace later includes Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Accepted + In Progress'

Name: Average duration of Queued + Awaiting Assignment in high-impact cases (impact = 'High') that also contain Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Queued + Awaiting Assignment and the end of the case

Name: Total waiting time to Queued + Awaiting Assignment in traces where Completed + In Call appears as a terminal activity
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call occurs
